name: Bhindi Sabji
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and thoroughly dry the okra.
2. Trim the bottom and top, then slice into rounds that are half an inch thick.
3. Heat the ghee in a large skillet over moderate heat.
4. Add the okra in a single layer and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Once the okra is tender, add the spices (coriander, cumin, Hungarian paprika, garam masala, turmeric) and continue to stir until the okra turns golden brown.
6. Remove from heat, season with salt, and serve.
